stemHtml: How can a pilot manage the symptoms of chronic fatigue?

options.a: Micro sleeps during long flights prevent chronic fatigue.
options.b: Carefully plan activities such as meals and rest during off days, especially during layovers in distant time zones.
options.c: There is no way to manage them.
options.d: One night of 8 hours sleep is sufficient to prevent the onset of fatigue from sleep debt.
